title: Group of reenactors depicting historical soldiers in uniform with rifles and horses.
vision_reason: Modern historical reenactment with period costumes and horses in forest setting; compositionally competent but lacks authentic documentary evidence for 1912 Balkan War Ottoman soldiers

title: Bronze statue and relief honoring Turkish martyrs in Çanakkale, Türkiye.
vision_reason: Monument to military/revolutionary figures with Ottoman-era soldiers depicted, but appears to be Soviet-era memorial rather than historical Balkan War photograph; excellent composition and striking vi

title: Three soldiers in vintage uniforms reenact a historical march in a grassy field.
vision_reason: Modern reenactment with correct period uniforms and setting, but contemporary production quality and staging lacks authentic documentary weight for 1912 Balkan War context
